dialogos.texto_en: That was surprising.\nThese things actually happen, huh?
Sorry for freaking you out.
No, it's not your fault, Ichika.
Ichika, Itsuki?\nDid something happen?
Oh, Futaro-kun. You were able to recognize me.
Huh? What do you mean?
Look. I look different from usual, right?
I mean, come on, just because I wear glasses,\ndoesn't mean my eyesight is that bad.
Ahaha! Don't make such a pouty face,\nit was just a joke.
Jeez...
But, why are you wearing glasses?\nYou don't have bad eyesight, do you?
No, it's just that...
While I was admiring the fountain with Itsuki-chan,\na father with his kids called out to me and said,\n'You're Nakano Ichika-san, right?'
Ahh, so it's a disguise.
I thought I wouldn't be noticed,\nbut there are sharp-eyed people after all.
Also, maybe little kids are more perceptive.
Little kids??
It seems that the kid was a fan of Ichika\nand asked for an autograph.
He was holding a memo pad and his hands were trembling\nwith nervousness.\nIt was adorable how serious he was.
I was happy too, and I wanted to sign an autograph,\nbut people around us started gathering.
I was surprised by that.\nWe had no choice but to run away...\nI feel sorry for the child.
Yeah. It was good that I was able\nto give him a handshake, at least.
Hey, I have a question.\nDoes just wearing glasses\nmake that much of a difference?
Yeah, it surprisingly does.
I see. It must be tough being a famous actress, huh?
Well, I guess, but I'm used to it by now.
There's no privacy if I'm always like this.\nDon't you feel a overwhelmed as well, Ichika?
Well, a bit. But being an actress\nis a path I chose myself, and I'm prepared for it.
And, there's still a long way to go.\nI want more and more people to see my acting.
Now that I've graduated,\nI must work harder than ever!
Wow...
Hm? What's wrong?
It's nothing, I was just thinking about how much you've also changed.
Huh?!\nWh-what is it, all of a sudden?
Didn't something like that happen before,\nwhen you were wearing glasses...
Ahhh...\nYeah, something like that did happen.
Back then, you screamed something like 'Don't tell\nanyone because it's embarrassing,' didn't you?\nCompared to that, you seem much calmer now.
It's been almost a year since then.\nMy perception has changed.
...I see.
My bad.\nYou were a good actress then,\nand you are still a good actress now, Ichika.
Hehe, thanks.
The circumstances\nhave also changed over this past year, Ichika.\nYou've become quite popular now.
Dramas, commercials, talk shows, variety shows...\nYou're on TV almost every day.\nIt's hard to keep track of everything.
HUH?!\nYou're keeping track of everything?
Of course!\nI save all of them TOO!
You love your big sister a little too much, eh.
That's fine, isn't it?!\nI want to watch the scenes where Ichika is in the spotlight, over and over again!
Ahaha...\nWell, I guess I love my little sister a bit\ntoo much too. But I think the feeling is mutual.
Nevertheless, you had so much work to do,\nhow were you able to take time off during this trip?
My boss worked very hard to arrange everything for me.\nAs a reward for balancing both work and school.
I'm interested in that collection.\nShow me when she's on a talk show next time.
Sure, I'll look for some good scenes\nand we can all have a viewing party together.
Oh? Futaro-kun,\nare you interested in my speeches?
Of course. I want to see what kind of idiotic things\nthe great actress Ichika talks about on TV!
Oh come on, you're so mean!\nBut I guess I expected nothing less from you!
Nevertheless, you had so much work to do,\nhow were you able to take time off during this trip?
My boss worked very hard to arrange everything for me.\nAs a reward for balancing both work and school.
I can understand how you feel, Itsuki.\nI'm curious to know how Ichika performs.
Are you going to score my acting too?\nThat's a bit much.
That's not what I meant.\nI just want to see you work hard towards your dreams.
Yeah...\nI get so shy when you say things like that to me directly.
But, thank you, Futaro-kun.
Nevertheless, you had so much work to do,\nhow were you able to take time off during this trip?
My boss worked very hard to arrange everything for me.\nAs a reward for balancing both work and school.
Besides, he really took care of a lot of things for me,\nso I have to work hard to repay him as well.
(Oh, so that boss\n has a good side to him too, huh...)
